app.title: GalMaster
status.ready: Ready — select a region, then hotkey to translate
tip.apply: Apply to running app (do not write file)
tip.overlay: Show or hide translation Overlay (main window only)
tip.clear_cache:
Clear translation cache and conversation history.
Cache keys include source + context window; next run will call the LLM again.
tip.result_history:
How many lines to keep in the result log (one line per dialogue turn).
Oldest lines drop when full. Default 12.
tip.llm_timeout:
Max seconds to wait for one API call (5–120).
On timeout the job soft-fails; the app does not hang forever.
tip.capture_method:
How to grab a bound window (OBS-style).
Automatic: WGC first, then GDI, then screen.
Unbound regions always use screen capture.
Auto-monitor polls with BitBlt under auto; full WGC is used for the OCR job.
hint.monitor_fields: Start Monitor applies Detect timing/threshold immediately (and saves them). Other form fields still need Apply/Save.
hint.vlm_optional: VLM recognizes source text only; translation uses Translate API below (optional).
hint.vlm_direct: One-shot source + translation — configure only this VLM endpoint.
hint.recognize: Shows recognition settings for the selected pipeline mode.
hint.recognize_local_active: Local OCR engine recognizes the source text.
hint.recognize_vlm_active: VLM recognizes the source text (local OCR not used).
hint.recognize_vlm_direct: One-shot: VLM only; Translate API is not used.
hint.translate_unused_vlm: VLM direct already includes translation; this group is unused.
hint.vlm_api_key: Required for VLM direct and VLM OCR
hint.overlay: Overlay: toggle source/translation, font, sizes, colors, panel, click-through (after Apply).
hint.obs: OBS Browser Source (127.0.0.1 only). Style updates live via SSE/poll — no page refresh needed.
tip.stable_ms:
How long the region must stay quiet before recognizing.
0 = fire as soon as change exceeds threshold.
Raise (e.g. 1000–2000 ms) for slow fade-in dialogue.
tip.interval:
How often to poll the screen.
0 = default 600 ms; runtime floor ~200 ms.
tip.threshold:
Mean pixel difference above this counts as a change.
0 = very sensitive (minimum gate only).
tip.cooldown:
Minimum time between auto-monitor fires.
0 = no extra cooldown (interval still applies; changes while busy go into the process buffer).
Default 1200 ms reduces rapid re-triggers.
tip.pipeline_buffer:
While OCR/LLM is busy, how many captured frames may wait in the queue.
1 = keep only the latest; when full, oldest is dropped.
Default 3. Raise to catch up on dialogue bursts; lower to stay on the newest line.
tip.pipeline_mode:
Chooses recognition method and whether to translate next:
· OCR → Translate: local OCR engine, then Translate API.
· VLM direct: one multimodal call (no Translate API).
· VLM OCR → Translate: VLM recognizes text, then Translate API (independent endpoints).
tip.context:
Prior source/translation turns sent as LLM context.
0 = current line only; 3–5 helps names/pronouns.
tip.ocr:
OCR engine:
• OneOCR: Snipping Tool oneocr.dll (recommended).
• Manga OCR: JP dialogue / game fonts.
• RapidOCR: lightweight multilingual ONNX.
• PaddleOCR: heavier PP-OCR.
Unused in VLM / VLM OCR modes.
tip.sampling:
Unchecked parameters are omitted from the API JSON body.
Default: temperature is omitted (provider default, often ~1.0).
For more stable dialogue, enable temperature 0.2.
Some models ignore or reject temperature / top_k / reasoning_effort.
tip.click_through:
Mouse passes through the Overlay (cannot move or resize it).
Apply or Save after changing.
overlay.hint: Drag to move · edges to resize · settings in main app
overlay.hint_clickthrough: Click-through · no move/resize · settings in main app
tip.refresh_models: Call GET /models (or Anthropic /v1/models) and fill the dropdown.\nRequires API Key and Base URL. You can still type a model id manually.
models.need_key: Enter an API Key before refreshing models
models.need_url: Enter a Base URL before refreshing models
status.monitor_start_failed: Failed to start monitor (previous thread may still be stopping)
status.hwnd_stale_abs: Bound window invalid — using last screen coordinates…
status.hwnd_stale: Bound window invalid — reselect the OCR region
monitor.zombie: Previous monitor thread still running; try again shortly
monitor.waiting_stable: Change detected — waiting for stable frame…
pipe.no_image: Internal error: Process stage missing image (Capture stage must supply it)
pipe.blank:
Capture almost blank/black (overlay blocking, window not drawn, or bad region). {info}
Check the capture preview in the main window.
pipe.ocr_empty:
OCR found no text. Capture {info}
Check the preview; for Japanese try OneOCR or Manga OCR and reselect the dialogue region.
pipe.vlm_need_key: VLM mode needs a key on the VLM API group (screenshot → multimodal LLM).
pipe.vlm_ocr_need_key: VLM OCR mode needs a key on the VLM API group.
pipe.vlm_empty: VLM returned no usable text; confirm the model supports vision.
